attrs.comment: Pixel offsets tracked using Imcorr. Input files were /snufkin/projects/cci/s2raw/s2raw/27XVH/2017-06-26/Seq00/B02.tiff and /snufkin/projects/cci/s2raw/s2raw/27XVH/2017-07-10/Seq02/B02.tiff. Intrinsic S2 shift (faulty georeferencing) estimated  as (x,y) = (0.6290, 0.2184) pixels. Shift was corrected. Pixel offsets converted to m/day using scaling dx_in_meters/dt_in_days = 10.0/14.0 = 0.7.
attrs.history: 2018-05-08 14:07:30 | Combined 2 input files ['/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/27XVH/2017-06-25_to_2017-07-12/2017-06-26_Seq00_to_2017-07-10_Seq02.nc', '/snufkin/projects/cci/ensemble/27XVH/2017-06-25_to_2017-07-12/2017-06-25_Seq00_to_2017-07-10_Seq00.nc'] by weighted average. Weights were cubed inverse RMS of velocity field. RMS was computed with 5x5 kernel.
attrs.summary: Ice Velocity seasonal product of Zachariae Glacier from Sentinel-2 data acquired between the 2017-06-25 and 2017-08-10
attrs.title: Zachariae_Seasonal_20170625_20170810
